selected_dialects.reason: Helical spring requires helix path + circular profile sweep — loft_sweep dialect provides helix and sweep operations.

unsupported_capabilities: No deterministic primitive exists for helical coil springs; involute_spur_gear and axisymmetric_turbine_disk do not match.
safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only — not manufacturing-ready, not structurally validated.
